form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into third after being driven well back, behind Fate Awaits at this track over 2138m in a 4yo+ NR 50 or better on April 4 at $10. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1660m at this track beaten 4 m by Applied (1:56.00) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 28 at $3.30. The ace draw may see him hard to stop.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr7) over 1660m after racing wide at this track beaten 6 m by The Rascal (1:56.10) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on April 7 at $3.80. Before that, a good run when 2nd (FT Fr1) over 2647m at this track, beaten 3 m by Fate Awaits (3:11.80) in 4yo+ No NR on March 24 at $7.50. Should get his chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Applied at this track over 1660m in a 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 28 at $19. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after a quick start, behind Fate Awaits at this track over 2138m in a 4yo+ NR 50 or better on April 4 at $26. Draws well so can make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by a nose (Sr1) at this track (1:55.00) beating Amami in NR up to 75 on March 28 at $13. Two runs back 2nd (Sr2) over 1780m at Redcliffe, beaten a neck by Sweet Agenda (2:09.30) in 3yo+ NR 55 to 65 on March 25 at $4.40. Will find this a lot tougher.

form.formComment: Resuming after eight months off the scene. Finished off last campaign recording by a neck after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (2:30.10) beating Ruby Rules in 3yo G1 No NR F on August 16 at $3.40 at the bell was 3rd-5.4m 2WNC. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 12 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (1:57.50) beating Sii Sempre Tilly in NR 49 to 53 on April 15 at $1.15. Draws wide but is talented and races well fresh.

form.formComment: Eight-year-old gelding showed improvement last start. 2nd (Fr3) over 2040m at Redcliffe beaten 6 m by Tralee Snickas (2:28.00) in 3yo+ NR 55 to 65 on April 2 at $12. The race before was not as impressive when beaten by 4 m finishing fifth behind Seaside Glory at this track over 1660m in a NR up to 75 on March 28 at $71. Facing a tough assignment this time around.
